emails.subject: Re: Open Lunch Dates
emails.body: Re: Open Lunch Dates Hey, Carol! November 15 looks like a great day. Any other day (except Friday) could work. Sara Carol St Clair 10/30/2000 10:36 AM

emails.subject: Re: Open Lunch Dates
emails.body: Sara: Looks like the 15th works for everyone. I look forward to seeing you both then. All of the St. Clair's are doing well. It's hard to believe that Charles will soon be 4 months. Time really does fly by and I am really enjoying my stay at home with him. I look forward to hearing from the both of you about work. See ya. Carol St. Clair EB 3892 713-853-3989 (Phone) 713-646-3393 (Fax) carol.st.clair@enron.com Sara Shackleton 11/02/00 05:21 PM
